ground_truth_resolution_summary: The workstation issue was caused by a confirmed malware detection. Security remediation cleared the malicious file and restored the endpoint. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Malicious file detected. Fix: Device isolated, threat removed, verified clean.
query: Antivirus alert with slow performance
positive: Cause: Malicious file detected. Fix: Device isolated, threat removed, verified clean.

title: Cannot unlock secure laptop
predicted_issue_text: Laptop booted into BitLocker recovery prompt
ground_truth_resolution_summary: Disk encryption recovery was triggered by a platform state change. Retrieving the valid recovery key and resyncing the protector resolved the issue. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Security-state change after device restart. Fix: Provided recovery key and unlocked device.
query: Laptop booted into BitLocker recovery prompt
positive: Cause: Security-state change after device restart. Fix: Provided recovery key and unlocked device.

title: Shared drive access issue
predicted_issue_text: Permission denied accessing project folder in shared drive.
ground_truth_resolution_summary: Missing folder permissions caused the access error. The correct group membership was applied and access was restored. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Account missing required security group. Fix: Added correct access group to account.
query: Permission denied accessing project folder in shared drive.
positive: Cause: Account missing required security group. Fix: Added correct access group to account.

title: Office Wi-Fi keeps dropping
predicted_issue_text: Wi-Fi keeps dropping due to expired certificate
ground_truth_resolution_summary: Secure Wi-Fi authentication was failing because the endpoint certificate had expired. Renewing the certificate restored wireless access.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Wireless certificate on laptop had expired. Fix: Pushed new wireless certificate and reconnected device.
query: Wi-Fi keeps dropping due to expired certificate
positive: Cause: Wireless certificate on laptop had expired. Fix: Pushed new wireless certificate and reconnected device.

title: Internal API integration failing
predicted_issue_text: API call failing after recent upstream service deployment
ground_truth_resolution_summary: The API failure was caused by an upstream contract change that the client service was not prepared for. Updating the client handling restored the integration. A secondary issue related to database_connection was also reported.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Upstream API response payload change broke downstream parser. Fix: Roll forward client configuration to current API contract.
query: API call failing after recent upstream service deployment
positive: Cause: Upstream API response payload change broke downstream parser. Fix: Roll forward client configuration to current API contract.

title: Suspicious email reported
predicted_issue_text: Received a suspicious phishing email about payroll or invoice review.
ground_truth_resolution_summary: Security review confirmed the message was malicious sender impersonation. The email was removed and similar messages were blocked. The user expressed urgency during the conversation. A secondary issue related to voip_telephony was also reported.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Email matched known phishing patterns. Fix: Quarantined the message and blocked similar sender patterns.
query: Received a suspicious phishing email about payroll or invoice review.
positive: Cause: Email matched known phishing patterns. Fix: Quarantined the message and blocked similar sender patterns.

title: Cannot reach network drive
predicted_issue_text: Cannot see network drive after sign-in
ground_truth_resolution_summary: The shared drive problem was caused by a stale local mapping entry. Refreshing the mapping policy restored access. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Stale mapping entry. Fix: Refreshed drive mapping policy.
query: Cannot see network drive after sign-in
positive: Cause: Stale mapping entry. Fix: Refreshed drive mapping policy.
